creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Jan 28 21:34:21 2014
New Revision: 341659
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/341659
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r341659/

Log:
  - Update to 1.4.17
  - Remove repcached patch as it seems defunct upstream
  
  PR:		ports/185746
  Submitted by:	Marc Peters <marc@mpeters.org>

Modified:
  head/databases/memcached/Makefile
  head/databases/memcached/distinfo

Modified: head/databases/memcached/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/memcached/Makefile	Tue Jan 28 21:31:50 2014	(r341658)
+++ head/databases/memcached/Makefile	Tue Jan 28 21:34:21 2014	(r341659)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	memcached
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.15
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.17
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE} \
 		${MASTER_SITE_GENTOO}
@@ -19,9 +19,8 @@ TEST_DEPENDS=	prove:${PORTSDIR}/lang/${P
 CONFLICTS=	memcached-1.2*
 
 # Dtrace option disabled until it is fixed upstream
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	REPCACHED SASL
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	SASL
 DTRACE_DESC=	Enable dtrace probes
-REPCACHED_DESC=	Enable data replication feature
 SASL_DESC=	Enable SASL Authentication
 
 USE_RC_SUBR=	memcached
@@ -59,14 +58,6 @@ CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-dtrace
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-dtrace
 .endif
 
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MREPCACHED}
-PATCH_SITES+=		${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
-PATCH_SITE_SUBDIR=	swills
-PATCH_DIST_STRIP+=	-p1
-PATCHFILES+=		repcached-2.3.1-${PORTVERSION}.patch.gz
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-replication
-.endif
-
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MSASL} && !defined(WITHOUT_SASL)
 LIB_DEPENDS+=		libsasl2.so:${PORTSDIR}/security/cyrus-sasl2
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-sasl

Modified: head/databases/memcached/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/memcached/distinfo	Tue Jan 28 21:31:50 2014	(r341658)
+++ head/databases/memcached/distinfo	Tue Jan 28 21:34:21 2014	(r341659)
@@ -1,4 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (memcached-1.4.15.tar.gz) = 169721ab7a7531add6ae9f6b14b6b5641725fe0b1f0bdf5c3a4327725901e2b4
-SIZE (memcached-1.4.15.tar.gz) = 324451
-SHA256 (repcached-2.3.1-1.4.15.patch.gz) = e1dca82ace0be8e8fe64e1737276b6467abf7bf86b5c1e645835404770cfdbed
-SIZE (repcached-2.3.1-1.4.15.patch.gz) = 19533
+SHA256 (memcached-1.4.17.tar.gz) = d9173ef6d99ba798c982ea4566cb4f0e64eb23859fdbf9926a89999d8cdc0458
+SIZE (memcached-1.4.17.tar.gz) = 326970
